allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Depth 2 | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Sort-Object FullName | Select-Object @{n='Path';e={$_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\', ''\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\benja\\Documents\\GitHub\\ClassicalKenKen"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server/index.js" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "server_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "server_err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $out = Get-Content "server_out.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $err = Get-Content "server_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $proc.Kill\(\); Remove-Item "server_out.txt","server_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "STDOUT: $out"; Write-Output "STDERR: $err")
